name: ai-code-review-assistant-root
description: Root package runner for AI-Powered Code Review Assistant

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.start:prod: concurrently "npm run start:prod --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
